LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_TurretAttackMana: Automatically attacks detected enemies. Each attack consumes {0} mana.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_ShootusEquip: Can be equipped with one ranged weapon and automatically attacks detected enemies with it. Melee or biocoded weapons cannot be equipped, and reloading is somewhat slower than when handled by a person.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_SensorExplosive: When {1} is detected within radius {0}, consumes {2} of stored mana to trigger a {4} explosion in radius {3}.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_DamageTriggeredExplosiv: When damaged, has a {0} chance to consume {1} of stored mana and trigger a {3} explosion in radius {2}.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_Terraform: Periodically improves terrain within a maximum radius of {0} into more fertile ground.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_TerraformPollution: Periodically cleans pollution within a maximum radius of {0}.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_FilthMaker: Spreads {0} within radius {1}, {2} times per day.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_SeedlingGrowthBonus: Increases the growth speed of adjacent arcane plant seedlings by {0}.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_Glow: Emits light while mana is active. (radius {0})
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_GlowRadiant: When under a roof, consumes mana to emit strong light during the day. (radius {0}) Within radius {1}, the light is bright enough for crops to grow.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_GlowStarlit: Blooms at night or in space, emitting light. (radius {0})
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_HeatPush: Pushes {0} heat per second while mana is active. (up to {1})
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_HeatAbsorb: Absorbs {0} heat per second while mana is active. (down to {1})
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_PowerPlant: When wired to a power network, generates up to {0}W of power proportional to the stored mana ratio.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_Battery: When wired to a power network, stores up to {0}Wd of power. (charging efficiency {1})
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_LightningRod: When unroofed and mana is active, attracts lightning strikes and increases nearby environment mana by {0}.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_SeedlingRandom: Grows into a random arcane plant when fully grown.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_Everflower: Vivis can perform attunement rituals to raise its resonance level, unlocking various rituals and abilities.
LanguageData.VV_PlantFunction_EverflowerTeleport: Can teleport to a designated location. (range {0})
